name: launch_asset_completion_rate
definition: Required assets produced (PH, email, thread, ad) divided by planned asset count for the launch.
target_hint: 100% before launch day. Missing any core asset delays coordinated launch.

name: cross_channel_consistency_score
definition: Manual rubric 1–5: same outcome promise across tagline, thread, email, ad.

name: ph_tagline_ctr_proxy
definition: PH listing clicks divided by impressions on launch day (from PH analytics).
target_hint: Top 5 products often >8% CTR on tagline+thumbnail combo. Weak tagline shows <3%.

name: email_launch_open_rate
definition: Opens divided by sends for launch announcement email to owned list.
target_hint: Warm list: 35–55%. Below 25% = subject line or list hygiene problem.

name: social_thread_engagement_rate
definition: Engagements (likes + replies + reposts) divided by impressions on hook tweet.
target_hint: Founder accounts 500–5k followers: 2–6% healthy on launch thread hook.
